title: `v1.15.0` Container not available on quay.io
body:
`v1.15.0` Container tag is not available in the quay repo. 

https://quay.io/repository/skopeo/stable?tab=tags&tag=latest

comments.body: Thanks for reaching out. The stable images are built from stable Fedora updates, and the Fedora update packages are still in the testing phase: https://bodhi.fedoraproject.org/updates/?search=skopeo .
